name: Beefy Spaghetti Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, combine ground beef, onion, garlic, and olive oil.
2. Microwave at high until the meat is no longer pink, stirring once during cooking.
3. Drain any excess fat or liquid from the mixture.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: parsley flakes, salt, pepper, green beans, tomato sauce, bay leaf, and beef stock.
5. Cover and microwave at high until the spaghetti is cooked through (approximately 20 to 25 minutes), stirring occasionally.
